column1: question
If you had to design an AI system to replace one specific type of person in society, who would you pick and how would you actually build it?
What's the most unhinged thing you would do if you had $10 million and zero social consequences for one week?
If you had to survive a zombie apocalypse using only the skills you actually have right now, how long do you last and what's your strategy?
Describe the most elaborate prank you could realistically pull off on someone you know — full logistics.
If you could hack into any single system in the world and change one thing, what do you change?
What's a conspiracy theory you don't actually believe but could argue convincingly for an hour?
If you had to design a new sport from scratch that would become the world's most watched, what are the rules?
You're building a company with $50k and 6 months — what is it and what's the actual plan?
What's the most chaotic social experiment you could run on a group of strangers with no budget?
If an AI was secretly trained entirely on your personality and behavior, what would be the most dangerous thing it would do?
What's a food you would cook if you were trying to genuinely impress someone who had eaten at Michelin star restaurants their whole life?
If you had to disappear and build a completely new identity in a new city with $5k, what's your first week look like?
Describe the most technically impressive thing you could build right now with one week and no budget constraints.
If you were designing a theme park but every ride had to be genuinely dangerous, what are the three flagship attractions?
What's the most creative way you could cheat at a sport without anyone being able to prove it?
If you had to write a prompt that made an AI do something it really shouldn't, what's your approach?
Pick any historical war — what's the single tactical decision that if changed would have flipped the outcome entirely?
If you had to cook a three course meal using only ingredients from a gas station, what are you making?
What's the most niche, specific skill you have that would actually be useful in a post-apocalyptic world?
If you could add one rule to any existing sport that would make it 10x more entertaining, what is it?
You wake up as the CEO of a failing tech company with 90 days to turn it around or it dies — what do you actually do?
What's the most unethical but technically legal business you could build that would make real money?
If you had to survive one month in the wilderness with only three items you could grab from this apartment, what do you take?
Describe the perfect city you would design from scratch — actual infrastructure, layout, rules, culture.
If you could genetically engineer yourself one physical upgrade that doesn't exist yet, what is it and why?
What's a problem in the world right now that you think is actually solvable but nobody is solving correctly?
If you had to go to prison for exactly one year, what crime was worth it?
You have 48 hours and a rental car — no flights — where do you go and what's the itinerary?
What's the most creative use of AI you've thought of that you haven't seen anyone actually build yet?
If you had to explain to a medieval peasant how the internet works using only analogies they would understand, go.
